title: Infinity Matter Dominator Sword: Reborn
description: A small mod that adds several extremely overpowered weapons.
body:
![Infinity Matter Dominator Sword: Reborn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c84a3f986cb3c68c23e35c1057563fa22e097d12.png)

This mod adds extremely overpowered weapons and items.

****

**Important Information**:
- Primarily designed and tested for single-player gameplay.
- Multiplayer compatibility is not guaranteed.
- The creator of this mod is Japanese and uses translation tools for the description, so there may be errors in the text.
- If you encounter a crash, please include a crash report or latest.log when reporting it.


****

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>
  
![Infinity Crystal Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39b7ea948a9b838c4e9d69a0a168b4bcc711a8e4.png)

Infinity Crystal

Recipe(shapeless) : Copper Block, Emerald Block, Gold Block, Coal Block, Diamond Block, Redstone Block, Iron Block, Lapis Lazuli Block, Quartz Block

Infinity Crystal can be crafted into blocks just like regular ore.

Infinity Crystals can be used as fuel for furnaces and will burn continuously for 1,728,000 ticks (equivalent to one day) per crystal.

![Infinity Crystal Tool Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d098a0e03dd37b59945d14a583f6c2ee30941d01.png)

Infinity Crystal Tool

Infinity Crystal tools can be crafted using various tools made of wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, and Netherite, along with three Infinity Crystals.

![Crystal Armor Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46245d1c57c722a5fd9d3b8f24074500dc69cb87.png)

Infinity Crystal Armor

Infinity Crystal armor can be crafted using various armor pieces made of leather, chainmail, iron, gold, diamond, or Netherite, along with an Infinity Crystal block.

However, a turtle shell is additionally required for the helmet, and an elytra is additionally required for the chestplate.

![Compressed Infinity Crystal Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e45dee545b6f8becc04d1e87825123a7d4be543.png)

Compressed Infinity Crystal Block

Recipe: Infinity Crystal Block x9

![Chaosium Nugget Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f7827fb3272ae3d6bc347b10b2ae3599b82f50d.png)

Chaosium Nugget

Recipe: Infinity Crystal, Netherite Ingot x4, Nether Star x4

It can be crafted just like regular metal.

![Chaotic Sword Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54d7854ce7ad5b1d3229a5dcb4100aa846e16d3a.png)

Chaotic Sword

Recipe: Crystal Sword, Chaosium Ingot x8

![Chaotic Paxel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05e2abf2f1157b994e28de4bc6e19de0d84dc7e8.png)

Chaotic Paxel

Recipe: Crystal Shovel, Crystal Axe, Crystal Pickaxe, Crystal Hoe, Chaosium Ingot x5

![Chaotic Armor Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb1c17915aad3de08db2ca8e2fbfd7c493f68f4d.png)

Chaotic Armor

Chaotic Armor can be crafted using Infinity Crystal Armor and 8 Chaosium Ingots.

![Chaotic Shield Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/897324ddcba2a4066f68f26d3d75ac8f3b49db16.png)

Chaotic Shield
Recipe: Shield, Chaosium Ingot x5, Infinity Crystal x3

![Chaotic Core Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0241c3d973db7f671151da79c6940cc1f45da50d.png)

Chaotic Core

Recipe: Chaosium Block, Chaosium Ingot x4, Chaosium Nugget x4

![Dominator Core Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96950ecfc9d917639902b72372025b3c9942e48b.png)

Dominator Core

Recipe: Chaotic Core, Compressed Infinity Crystal Block x8


![Infinity Matter Dominator Sword Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ae469eeb4dbc8dbd7bcad3b05f023941d6f962c.png)
 

Infinity Matter Dominator Sword 

Recipe:Dominator Core, Chaotic Sword, Chaotic Paxel, Chaotic Shield, Chaosium Ingot, Infinity Crystal x2


![Infinity Matter Dominator Sword Recipe(Easy Mode)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91a23e874d9eaeaad201bfed6879cc2a71cb4468.png)

Easy Recipe (Disabled by default): Dirt x8, wooden sword

If enabled in the config file, an alternative extremely easy recipe for the Infinity Matter Dominator Sword becomes available.


</details>





<details>
<summary>Weapon, Tool, and Armor Description</summary>

<details>
<summary>Chaotic Sword</summary>


![Chaotic Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bde67c3011ffad05eea096d9d00ece288a9caf2_0.webp)

- Durability: 1,000,000

- Attack Damage: 1,000,000

- Attack Speed: 4.0

- Entity Reach +2

### Ability:
- Right-clicking deals 10,000 damage to mobs within a 16x16x16 range centered on the player. 1-second cooldown.



- While in the player's inventory, it constantly grants Strength X and nullifies Weakness effects.



- When attacking, the player gains 10% of the experience points required to level up, plus 30 experience points.


- The range of sweeping attacks increases.


- The critical damage multiplier will be changed to 10,000x.


- If a player attacks a mob while sneaking, the attack will always be a critical hit.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Chaotic Paxel</summary>


![Chaotic Paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24c60d41f85e7fe1eaae364710fd33ece1cb7e58_0.webp)

- Durability: 1,000,000



- Efficiency: ∞



- Attack Damage: 100



- Attack Speed: 100


- Block Reach +2


### Ability:

- Chaotic Paxel is treated as a suitable tool for all blocks.



- When destroying a block, gain 5% of the experience points required to level up plus 10 experience points.



- Chaotic Paxel can till soil without consuming Durability.



- Right-clicking while sneaking toggles between the Fortune X enchantment and Silk Touch enchantment on tools.



- While in the player's inventory, constantly grants Haste IV and disables the mining fatigue effect.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Chaotic Armor</summary>

![Chaotic Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ffbba8fcd12d6142063e23998ad47f4cb2096a3_0.webp)

- Durability: ∞



- Armor(Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots): 50, 120, 100, 50



- Armor Toughness: 30



- KnockBack Resistance: 10





### Ability:

- Always grants night vision and nullifies suffocation damage. (Helmet)



- Elytra flight becomes possible, and damage from colliding with walls is negated. (Chestplate)



- Movement speed increases by 40%, and step height increases by 2. (Leggings)



- Nullifies fall damage and allows walking on powder snow. (Boots)



- Always gains Fire Resistance and Water Breathing effects, plus a level of Resistance effect and Saturation effect based on the number of Chaotic armor pieces equipped. (Common)



- Max HP increases by 20 for each piece of Chaotic Armor equipped. (Common)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Chaotic Shield</summary>
  
![Chaotic Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a03ccecad9fc6dc3bd16c2f471ce22eac7c0e69_0.webp)

- Durability: 1,000,000

 
### Ability:
- If the player is holding the item in either hand and using it for defense, and their Absorption Health is 20% or less of their maximum HP, Absorption Health will be set to a value equal to 20% of their maximum HP.

- When the shield block is released, it fires 36 low-accuracy arrows and 1 arrow with 100% accuracy.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Chaotic Core</summary>

![Chaotic Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d82c1c8afdf9bd7be1bd721496d32829aa5a967a_0.webp)

Ability:

- Right-clicking while holding the Chaotic Core in either hand deals 1,000,000 damage to a wide area in front of the player. 0.5-second cooldown.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Dominator Core</summary>

![Dominator Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b8eedb91db73f95a8c62ba89289f2d263921b90.png)


(The following abilities activate only when the Infinity Matter Dominator Sword is in the player's inventory.)

Ability:

- While holding any item in the player's off-hand, right-click in mid-air to double the number of items in the off-hand. This effect ignores vanilla stack limits, allowing the player to hold up to 1,000,000,000 items. 



- Right-clicking on a block will instantly obtain that block. If the block has NBT data, it will also copy and obtain that NBT data.

- Right-clicking on a block will instantly obtain that block. If the block has NBT data, it will also copy and obtain that NBT data.

 

- The Dominator Core remembers items using the /dominatorcore <item> command, or by directly entering the item's registry name in chat while holding the Dominator Core. 
Additionally, the /dominatorcore <item> command does not require execution permissions.

If a player right-clicks while their off-hand is empty, they will pick up the memorized items. The number of items picked up at once is equal to the stack size of the Dominator Core, but there is a limit of 64 items.



- When a player right-clicks while sneaking and has no item in their off-hand, any items that would normally drop upon defeating a mob within a 16x16x16 block radius centered on the player will be immediately dropped by that mob.



- This item is always considered to have the Fortune X enchantment, but it cannot break blocks. Instead, as long as a player holds this item in their main hand and left-clicks on a block, it will continuously drop the items that would normally be obtained upon breaking that block.
The number of attempts per tick increases based on the number of stacks of this item, up to a maximum of 64 attempts.

</details>





<details>
<summary>Infinity Matter Dominator Sword</summary>

![Infinity Matter Dominator Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24150253b4cb845ce5c5c62c05886f56b4828e56.png)


- Durability:∞

- Attack Damage:∞

- Attack Speed:∞


### Ability:
- While the left click is held down, it will always kill all entities.
(During this attack, the inventories of all players across all dimensions will be cleared, and they will be disconnected.)

- Right-clicking will delete all entities.
(During this attack, the inventories of all players across all dimensions will be cleared, and they will be disconnected.)

- Right-clicking while sneaking activates Kill Mode, which continuously deletes all entities and prevents them from spawning. Right-clicking again while sneaking deactivates Kill Mode.
(While in Kill Mode, the inventories of players in all dimensions will be cleared, and they will remain disconnected.)

- Instantly kills mobs that approach the player while wielding the Infinity Matter Dominator Sword. Configurable.

- While holding the Infinity Matter Dominator Sword, all entities cease movement. Configurable.


- When held in inventory, the player's health becomes infinite, and all damage and instant death are nullified.

- While held in inventory, experience points are permanently fixed at 2,147,483,647, and the player is always fully satiated.

- While held in inventory, disables healing, invincibility frames, totem usage, and shield blocking for all entities.

- While held, nullifies all explosions.

- Instantly destroys blocks. In Creative mode, only activates while sneaking. Range and item drop settings can be configured.

- While in the player's main hand, grants the ability to fly. Configurable.

- Entity Reach and Block Reach will increase by 1,000,000%. You can change this to Reach +4 in the configuration.

- While in the player's inventory, disables harmful effects. Configurable to also disable neutral effects and beneficial effects.

- Provides some of the capabilities of Creative mode.

- This item cannot be enchanted.

- The name of this tool cannot be changed.

- Immunity to the /clear, /kick, and /item commands.

- Disables all /execute commands. Configurable.

- While holding the Infinity Matter Dominator Sword, no players can open the GUI or pick up items.

- Disable some inventory deletion functions.

- While held in inventory, attack cooldowns are ignored.

- Gains resistance to disconnections while in inventory.

### Additional Features:

- Can invoke the instant-kill method of a mod that is an optional dependency.



- Each feature can be enabled or disabled individually in the configuration file.



- In Kill Mode, all available instant-kill methods are always used, regardless of the settings in the configuration.

</details>





</details>



<details>
<summary>Creative Only Items</summary>

![Void Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8e31353deceee8fe6752d56a57331e5c36fdf7_0.webp)

Void Sword


- Durability: ∞

- Attack Damage: ∞

- Attack Speed: ∞

- Entity Reach +100

### Ability:
- When attacking mobs, it deals the same instant-kill attack as the Infinity Matter Dominator Sword. If it attacks while sneaking, it erases the target. (If the target of this attack is the player, it deletes the target’s inventory and disconnects them.)



- When the player right-clicks while holding it in either hand, it unleashes the same instant-kill attack as the Infinity Matter Dominator Sword within a 16×16×16 area. If activated while sneaking, it erases the target. (If the target of this attack is the player, it deletes the target’s inventory and disconnects them.)

### Additional Features:

- If enchanted, can invoke the instant-kill method of a mod that is an optional dependency.

</details>
